definicao:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_all_units()
 RETURNS TABLE(id uuid, name text, code text, created_at timestamp with time zone, updated_at timestamp with time zone)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
  SELECT id, name, code, created_at, updated_at
  FROM public.units
  ORDER BY name ASC;
$function$

args: _start_ts timestamp with time zone, _end_ts timestamp with time zone, _cdt_code text
definicao:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_cobranca_aggregates(_start_ts timestamp with time zone, _end_ts timestamp with time zone, _cdt_code text DEFAULT NULL::text)
 RETURNS TABLE(regua text, valor_cobrado numeric, valor_pago numeric)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
  SELECT
    -- Determinar régua: se NULL, usar valor_inadimplente para classificar
    CASE 
      WHEN regua IS NOT NULL THEN regua
      WHEN valor_inadimplente = 3090 THEN '1'
      WHEN valor_inadimplente = 6180 THEN '2'
      ELSE regua -- mantém NULL se não corresponder
    END AS regua,
    -- Valor em aberto: SEMPRE filtra por hora_link_gerado no período (igual ao KPI)
    COALESCE(SUM(
      CASE 
        WHEN link_pagamento_enviado IS TRUE
          AND (pagamento_feito IS NOT TRUE OR data_pagamento IS NULL)
          AND hora_link_gerado IS NOT NULL 
          AND hora_link_gerado >= _start_ts 
          AND hora_link_gerado <= _end_ts
          AND (_cdt_code IS NULL OR 'ibirite001' = _cdt_code)
        THEN valor_inadimplente ELSE 0 END
    ) / 100.0, 0) AS valor_cobrado,
    -- Valor pago
    COALESCE(SUM(
      CASE 
        WHEN pagamento_feito IS TRUE
          AND data_pagamento IS NOT NULL
          AND data_pagamento >= _start_ts 
          AND data_pagamento <= _end_ts
          AND (_cdt_code IS NULL OR 'ibirite001' = _cdt_code)
        THEN valor_inadimplente ELSE 0 END
    ) / 100.0, 0) AS valor_pago
  FROM public.clientes_cobranca_dashboard
  GROUP BY 
    CASE 
      WHEN regua IS NOT NULL THEN regua
      WHEN valor_inadimplente = 3090 THEN '1'
      WHEN valor_inadimplente = 6180 THEN '2'
      ELSE regua
    END
  HAVING 
    COALESCE(SUM(
      CASE 
        WHEN link_pagamento_enviado IS TRUE
          AND (pagamento_feito IS NOT TRUE OR data_pagamento IS NULL)
          AND hora_link_gerado IS NOT NULL 
          AND hora_link_gerado >= _start_ts 
          AND hora_link_gerado <= _end_ts
          AND (_cdt_code IS NULL OR 'ibirite001' = _cdt_code)
        THEN valor_inadimplente ELSE 0 END
    ), 0) > 0
    OR
    COALESCE(SUM(
      CASE 
        WHEN pagamento_feito IS TRUE
          AND data_pagamento IS NOT NULL
          AND data_pagamento >= _start_ts 
          AND data_pagamento <= _end_ts
          AND (_cdt_code IS NULL OR 'ibirite001' = _cdt_code)
        THEN valor_inadimplente ELSE 0 END
    ), 0) > 0
  ORDER BY 
    CASE 
      WHEN CASE 
        WHEN regua IS NOT NULL THEN regua
        WHEN valor_inadimplente = 3090 THEN '1'
        WHEN valor_inadimplente = 6180 THEN '2'
        ELSE regua
      END IS NULL THEN 99
      ELSE 
        CASE 
          WHEN CASE 
            WHEN regua IS NOT NULL THEN regua
            WHEN valor_inadimplente = 3090 THEN '1'
            WHEN valor_inadimplente = 6180 THEN '2'
            ELSE regua
          END ~ '^[0-9]+$' THEN 
            CAST(CASE 
              WHEN regua IS NOT NULL THEN regua
              WHEN valor_inadimplente = 3090 THEN '1'
              WHEN valor_inadimplente = 6180 THEN '2'
              ELSE regua
            END AS INTEGER)
          ELSE 99
        END
    END;
$function$

args: p_unit_id uuid, p_start timestamp with time zone, p_end timestamp with time zone
definicao:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_cobranca_by_regua(p_unit_id uuid, p_start timestamp with time zone, p_end timestamp with time zone)
 RETURNS TABLE(regua text, valor_cobrado numeric, valor_pago numeric)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
  WITH
    pagas_no_periodo AS (
      SELECT DISTINCT p.matricula
      FROM public.pagamentos p
      WHERE p.data_pagamento >= p_start
        AND p.data_pagamento <= p_end
        AND (p_unit_id IS NULL OR p.unit_id = p_unit_id)
    ),
    cobrado AS (
      SELECT
        COALESCE(c.regua, 'Sem Régua') AS regua,
        SUM(c.valor_inadimplente)::numeric / 100.0 AS valor
      FROM public.clientes_cobranca_dashboard c
      WHERE c.link_pagamento_enviado = true
        AND c.hora_link_gerado >= p_start
        AND c.hora_link_gerado <= p_end
        AND (p_unit_id IS NULL OR c.unit_id = p_unit_id)
        AND c.pagamento_feito = false
        AND c.matricula NOT IN (SELECT matricula FROM pagas_no_periodo WHERE matricula IS NOT NULL)
      GROUP BY COALESCE(c.regua, 'Sem Régua')
    ),
    pago AS (
      SELECT
        COALESCE(p.regua, 'Sem Régua') AS regua,
        SUM(p.valor)::numeric / 100.0 AS valor
      FROM public.pagamentos p
      WHERE p.data_pagamento >= p_start
        AND p.data_pagamento <= p_end
        AND (p_unit_id IS NULL OR p.unit_id = p_unit_id)
      GROUP BY COALESCE(p.regua, 'Sem Régua')
    )
  SELECT
    COALESCE(co.regua, pa.regua) AS regua,
    COALESCE(co.valor, 0)        AS valor_cobrado,
    COALESCE(pa.valor, 0)        AS valor_pago
  FROM cobrado co
  FULL OUTER JOIN pago pa ON pa.regua = co.regua
$function$

args: p_unit_id uuid, p_start timestamp with time zone, p_end timestamp with time zone
definicao:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_cobranca_kpis(p_unit_id uuid, p_start timestamp with time zone, p_end timestamp with time zone)
 RETURNS TABLE(pagamentos_realizados bigint, valores_recebidos numeric, pagamentos_dia bigint, valores_recebidos_dia numeric, pagamentos_ontem bigint, valores_recebidos_ontem numeric, clientes_contactados bigint, interacoes bigint, links_enviados bigint, valores_links_aberto numeric, cobrancas_hoje bigint)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
  WITH
    today_brt AS (
      SELECT (now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date AS d
    ),
    pag_periodo AS (
      SELECT p.valor
      FROM public.pagamentos p
      WHERE p.data_pagamento >= p_start
        AND p.data_pagamento <= p_end
        AND (p_unit_id IS NULL OR p.unit_id = p_unit_id)
    ),
    pag_today AS (
      SELECT p.valor
      FROM public.pagamentos p, today_brt t
      WHERE (p.data_pagamento AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date = t.d
        AND (p_unit_id IS NULL OR p.unit_id = p_unit_id)
    ),
    pag_yesterday AS (
      SELECT p.valor
      FROM public.pagamentos p, today_brt t
      WHERE (p.data_pagamento AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date = t.d - 1
        AND (p_unit_id IS NULL OR p.unit_id = p_unit_id)
    ),
    cnt_contactados AS (
      SELECT COUNT(*) AS n
      FROM public.clientes_cobranca_dashboard c
      WHERE c.data_ultimo_disparo >= p_start::date
        AND c.data_ultimo_disparo <= p_end::date
        AND (p_unit_id IS NULL OR c.unit_id = p_unit_id)
    ),
    cnt_interacoes AS (
      SELECT COUNT(*) AS n
      FROM public.clientes_cobranca_dashboard c
      WHERE c.data_ultima_mensagem_temp >= p_start
        AND c.data_ultima_mensagem_temp <= p_end
        AND (p_unit_id IS NULL OR c.unit_id = p_unit_id)
    ),
    links AS (
      SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS n,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN c.pagamento_feito = false THEN c.valor_inadimplente ELSE 0 END), 0)::numeric / 100.0 AS aberto
      FROM public.clientes_cobranca_dashboard c
      WHERE c.link_pagamento_enviado = true
        AND c.hora_link_gerado >= p_start
        AND c.hora_link_gerado <= p_end
        AND (p_unit_id IS NULL OR c.unit_id = p_unit_id)
    ),
    cnt_cobr_hoje AS (
      SELECT COUNT(*) AS n
      FROM public.clientes_cobranca_dashboard c, today_brt t
      WHERE c.data_ultimo_disparo = t.d
        AND (p_unit_id IS NULL OR c.unit_id = p_unit_id)
    )
  SELECT
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pag_periodo)::bigint,
    COALESCE((SELECT SUM(valor) FROM pag_periodo), 0)::numeric / 100.0,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pag_today)::bigint,
    COALESCE((SELECT SUM(valor) FROM pag_today), 0)::numeric / 100.0,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pag_yesterday)::bigint,
    COALESCE((SELECT SUM(valor) FROM pag_yesterday), 0)::numeric / 100.0,
    (SELECT n FROM cnt_contactados)::bigint,
    (SELECT n FROM cnt_interacoes)::bigint,
    (SELECT n FROM links)::bigint,
    (SELECT aberto FROM links),
    (SELECT n FROM cnt_cobr_hoje)::bigint
$function$

args: _start_ts timestamp with time zone, _end_ts timestamp with time zone, _cdt_code text
definicao:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_cobranca_metrics(_start_ts timestamp with time zone, _end_ts timestamp with time zone, _cdt_code text DEFAULT NULL::text)
 RETURNS TABLE(total_contactados integer, interacoes integer, links_enviados integer, pagamentos_realizados integer, valores_em_aberto numeric, valores_recebidos numeric)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
  SELECT
    -- Total contactados: clientes que tiveram disparo no período OU pagamento no período
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE 
      WHEN (
        (data_ultimo_disparo IS NOT NULL 
         AND data_ultimo_disparo::date >= (_start_ts AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date 
         AND data_ultimo_disparo::date <= (_end_ts AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date)
        OR (pagamento_feito IS TRUE 
            AND data_pagamento IS NOT NULL 
            AND data_pagamento >= _start_ts 
            AND data_pagamento <= _end_ts)
      ) AND (_cdt_code IS NULL OR 'ibirite001' = _cdt_code)
      THEN id 
    END)::int AS total_contactados,
    
    -- Interações: clientes que responderam E data_ultima_mensagem_temp no período
    COUNT(*) FILTER (
      WHERE respondeu IS TRUE
        AND data_ultima_mensagem_temp IS NOT NULL
        AND data_ultima_mensagem_temp >= _start_ts
        AND data_ultima_mensagem_temp <= _end_ts
        AND (_cdt_code IS NULL OR 'ibirite001' = _cdt_code)
    )::int AS interacoes,
    
    -- Links enviados: usando hora_link_gerado (timestamp preciso) no horário de Brasília
    COUNT(*) FILTER (
      WHERE hora_link_gerado IS NOT NULL
        AND hora_link_gerado >= _start_ts
        AND hora_link_gerado <= _end_ts
        AND link_pagamento_enviado IS TRUE
        AND (_cdt_code IS NULL OR 'ibirite001' = _cdt_code)
    )::int AS links_enviados,
    
    -- Pagamentos: continua usando data_pagamento
    COUNT(*) FILTER (
      WHERE pagamento_feito IS TRUE
        AND data_pagamento IS NOT NULL
        AND data_pagamento >= _start_ts 
        AND data_pagamento <= _end_ts
        AND (_cdt_code IS NULL OR 'ibirite001' = _cdt_code)
    )::int AS pagamentos_realizados,
    
    -- Valores em aberto: links gerados no período (usando hora_link_gerado) sem pagamento
    COALESCE(SUM(
      CASE 
        WHEN hora_link_gerado IS NOT NULL
          AND hora_link_gerado >= _start_ts
          AND hora_link_gerado <= _end_ts
          AND link_pagamento_enviado IS TRUE
          AND (pagamento_feito IS NOT TRUE OR data_pagamento IS NULL)
          AND (_cdt_code IS NULL OR 'ibirite001' = _cdt_code)
        THEN valor_inadimplente ELSE 0 END
    ) / 100.0, 0)::numeric AS valores_em_aberto,
    
    -- Valores recebidos: continua usando data_pagamento
    COALESCE(SUM(
      CASE 
        WHEN pagamento_feito IS TRUE
          AND data_pagamento IS NOT NULL
          AND data_pagamento >= _start_ts 
          AND data_pagamento <= _end_ts
          AND (_cdt_code IS NULL OR 'ibirite001' = _cdt_code)
        THEN valor_inadimplente ELSE 0 END
    ) / 100.0, 0)::numeric AS valores_recebidos
  FROM public.clientes_cobranca_dashboard;
$function$

args: _start_ts timestamp with time zone, _end_ts timestamp with time zone, _cdt_code text
definicao:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_daily_payment_counts(_start_ts timestamp with time zone, _end_ts timestamp with time zone, _cdt_code text DEFAULT NULL::text)
 RETURNS TABLE(payment_date date, client_count integer)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
  SELECT
    (data_pagamento AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date AS payment_date,
    COUNT(*)::integer AS client_count
  FROM public.clientes_cobranca_dashboard
  WHERE pagamento_feito IS TRUE
    AND data_pagamento IS NOT NULL
    AND data_pagamento >= _start_ts 
    AND data_pagamento <= _end_ts
    AND (_cdt_code IS NULL OR 'ibirite001' = _cdt_code)
  GROUP BY (data_pagamento AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date
  ORDER BY payment_date ASC;
$function$

args: p_unit_id uuid, p_start timestamp with time zone, p_end timestamp with time zone
definicao:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_daily_payments(p_unit_id uuid, p_start timestamp with time zone, p_end timestamp with time zone)
 RETURNS TABLE(dia date, qtde bigint, valor numeric)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
  SELECT
    (p.data_pagamento AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date AS dia,
    COUNT(*)::bigint                                          AS qtde,
    (SUM(p.valor)::numeric / 100.0)                           AS valor
  FROM public.pagamentos p
  WHERE p.data_pagamento >= p_start
    AND p.data_pagamento <= p_end
    AND (p_unit_id IS NULL OR p.unit_id = p_unit_id)
  GROUP BY 1
  ORDER BY 1
$function$

args: p_start timestamp with time zone, p_end timestamp with time zone
definicao:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_daily_payments_multi(p_start timestamp with time zone, p_end timestamp with time zone)
 RETURNS TABLE(dia date, unit_id uuid, qtde bigint)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
  SELECT
    (p.data_pagamento AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date AS dia,
    p.unit_id                                                 AS unit_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint                                          AS qtde
  FROM public.pagamentos p
  WHERE p.data_pagamento >= p_start
    AND p.data_pagamento <= p_end
    AND p.unit_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1, 2
  ORDER BY 1, 2
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_open_payment_links(p_unit_id uuid DEFAULT NULL::uuid, p_days integer DEFAULT 7)
 RETURNS TABLE(matricula text, valor numeric, regua text, created_at timestamp with time zone, correlation_id text, unit_id uuid)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (l.matricula)
    l.matricula,
    l.valor,
    l.regua,
    l.created_at,
    l.correlation_id,
    l.unit_id
  FROM public.links_pagamentos_gerados l
  WHERE l.status = 'pending'
    AND l.cancelado_at IS NULL
    AND l.created_at >= now() - (p_days || ' days')::interval
    AND (p_unit_id IS NULL OR l.unit_id = p_unit_id)
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM public.pagamentos p
      WHERE p.correlation_id = l.correlation_id
        AND p.reembolso_realizado IS NOT TRUE
    )
  ORDER BY l.matricula, l.created_at DESC;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_pagamentos(_start_date date, _end_date date)
 RETURNS TABLE(id integer, data_pagamento text, matricula text, name text, whatsapp text, valor_inadimplente numeric, regua text, correlation_id text, link_pagamento text, plataforma_pagamento_utilizada text, baixa_realizada boolean, baixa_realizada_at timestamp with time zone, baixa_realizada_by text, reembolso_realizado boolean, reembolso_realizado_at timestamp with time zone, reembolso_motivo text, reembolso_realizado_by text)
 LANGUAGE sql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
  SELECT
    id,
    data_pagamento::text as data_pagamento,
    matricula,
    name,
    whatsapp,
    valor_inadimplente,
    regua,
    correlation_id,
    link_pagamento,
    plataforma_pagamento_utilizada,
    baixa_realizada,
    baixa_realizada_at,
    baixa_realizada_by,
    reembolso_realizado,
    reembolso_realizado_at,
    reembolso_motivo,
    reembolso_realizado_by
  FROM public.clientes_cobranca_dashboard
  WHERE pagamento_feito IS TRUE
    AND data_pagamento IS NOT NULL
    AND ((data_pagamento AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date) >= _start_date
    AND ((data_pagamento AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date) <= _end_date
  ORDER BY ((data_pagamento AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date) DESC, data_pagamento DESC;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_pausas_vencidas()
 RETURNS TABLE(matricula text, name text, whatsapp text, pausa_motivo text, pausa_data_prometida date, data_combinada_br text, unit_id uuid, phone_number_id text, waba_token text)
 LANGUAGE sql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
  SELECT
    c.matricula,
    c.name,
    c.whatsapp,
    c.pausa_motivo,
    c.pausa_data_prometida,
    TO_CHAR(COALESCE(c.pausa_data_prometida, c.disparos_pausados_ate), 'DD/MM') AS data_combinada_br,
    c.unit_id,
    d.numero_telefone AS phone_number_id,
    d.waba_token
  FROM clientes_cobranca_setembro c
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT numero_telefone, waba_token
      FROM disparadores_whatsapp
      WHERE unit_id = c.unit_id
        AND ativo = true
        AND waba_token IS NOT NULL
      ORDER BY disparos_sucesso_hoje ASC
      LIMIT 1
  ) d ON true
  WHERE c.disparos_pausados_ate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.disparos_pausados_ate <= current_date
    AND c.pagamento_feito = false
    AND c.bloqueio_disparos = false
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_pay_checkout(p_correlation_id text)
 RETURNS TABLE(correlation_id text, matricula text, valor numeric, status text, expires_at timestamp with time zone, brcode text, pix_gateway text, created_at timestamp with time zone, data_link_gerado timestamp with time zone, unit_id uuid, customer_name text, unit_name text, unit_cnpj text, unit_whatsapp text)
 LANGUAGE sql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
  SELECT
    l.correlation_id, l.matricula, l.valor, l.status, l.expires_at,
    l.pix_copia_cola AS brcode, l.pix_gateway, l.created_at, l.data_link_gerado, l.unit_id,
    c.name AS customer_name, u.name AS unit_name,
    NULL::TEXT AS unit_cnpj,
    u.whatsapp_phone AS unit_whatsapp
  FROM public.links_pagamentos_gerados l
  LEFT JOIN public.clientes_cobranca_dashboard c ON c.matricula = l.matricula
  LEFT JOIN public.units u ON u.id = l.unit_id
  WHERE l.correlation_id = p_correlation_id AND l.pix_gateway = 'abacate'
  LIMIT 1;
$function$
